# Acromatico - Professional Photography & Creative Education Platform

## Business Overview

Acromatico is a dual-service professional photography studio and creative education platform founded by Italo Campilii and Ale Campilii. Based in South Florida (Sarasota, Miami, Fort Lauderdale), we serve clients worldwide with comprehensive photography services and innovative creative education programs for children ages 7-14.

**Primary Services:**
- Wedding Photography & Videography (70% of content portfolio)
- Portrait Photography (Family, Maternity, Newborn, Engagement)
- Commercial Photography & Brand Campaigns
- Creative Education Platform (Launching 2026)
- Fine Art Photography Gallery
- Web Design & Branding Services

**Mission:** To capture authentic moments through photojournalistic storytelling combined with fine art aesthetics, while empowering the next generation of creative entrepreneurs through cinema-grade education programs.

## Founder Background & Story

**Italo Campilii** is an award-winning photographer with 20+ years of professional experience. After battling Crohn's disease for 21 years with frequent hospitalizations, Italo discovered the profound connection between environmental toxins and health deterioration. This personal journey led him to co-found not only Acromatico Photography but also Ecolosophy, a revolutionary non-toxic cleaning products company.

Italo's photography has been featured in:
- Martha Stewart Weddings
- The Knot
- Wedding Wire
- Major national and international publications

**Ale Campilii** co-founded Acromatico Photography and brings a unique perspective to capturing intimate, authentic moments. Together, Italo and Ale have photographed over 500 weddings and portrait sessions across multiple continents.

**Personal Philosophy:** Italo operates with McKinsey-level strategic thinking, focusing on high-efficiency systems that deliver 10x returns. He's guided by the 80/20 principle, is deeply spiritual (Bible-aligned), and committed to elevating others through deeply educational, story-driven content that empowers transformation.

## Photography Services

### Wedding Photography

**Signature Style:** Photojournalistic documentary storytelling with fine art aesthetics. We specialize in capturing authentic, unposed moments during your wedding day while creating timeless, editorial-quality images.

**Service Packages:**
- **Essential Package:** $3,500 - 8 hours coverage, engagement session, high-resolution digital files, online gallery
- **Premium Package:** $5,500 - 10 hours coverage, second shooter, engagement session, premium album, expedited delivery
- **Complete Package:** $6,500 - Full-day coverage, second shooter, engagement session, cinematic highlight film, custom album, prints

**Venue Expertise:** 
We've photographed weddings at 350+ venues across Florida, New York, Pennsylvania, and international destinations including Lake Como, Paris, Cancun, and Milan. Specialized knowledge of:
- Historic estates and industrial-chic venues
- Waterfront locations and beach ceremonies
- Barn weddings and rustic settings
- Urban rooftop venues and modern hotels
- Destination weddings worldwide

**Photography Approach:**
- Natural light whenever possible, no harsh flash
- Documentary-style ceremony coverage (no posing during key moments)
- 20-30 minute golden hour portrait sessions at optimal times
- Reception coverage capturing candid moments and energy
- Dramatic wide shots balanced with intimate close-ups
- Full edited gallery delivered 2-3 weeks for standard sessions, 4-6 weeks for weddings

### Portrait Photography

**Services Offered:**
- Family Portraits (all ages, extended families, multi-generational)
- Maternity Sessions (indoor/outdoor, lifestyle/posed)
- Newborn Photography (in-home or studio)
- Engagement Sessions (included with wedding packages or standalone)
- Senior Portraits
- Corporate Headshots & Team Photos
- Anniversary Sessions (couples celebrating milestones)

**Session Details:**
- Typical session length: 1-3 hours depending on type
- Preview gallery delivered within 48-72 hours
- Full edited gallery: 2-3 weeks
- High-resolution digital files with print rights included
- Online gallery access for sharing and downloading
- Optional add-ons: custom albums, prints, canvases

**Location Specialization:**
- South Florida beaches (Siesta Key, Lido Beach, Longboat Key, South Beach)
- Urban environments (Wynwood, Miami Design District, downtown Sarasota)
- Parks and natural settings (Matheson Hammock Park, Marie Selby Gardens)
- Hudson Valley, New York (Cold Spring, Beacon, Storm King)
- International destinations (Lake Como, Milan, Paris)

### Commercial Photography

**Services:**
- Brand campaigns and marketing content
- Product photography (e-commerce, lifestyle, editorial)
- Corporate headshots and team photos
- Architecture and interior design photography
- Restaurant and hospitality photography
- Event photography (corporate events, conferences, galas)

**Approach:**
Clean, modern aesthetic with attention to brand consistency and commercial viability. We work directly with marketing teams to understand brand voice and visual requirements.

### Fine Art Print Gallery

**Available Works:**
Limited-edition signed prints from our global portfolio, including:
- Landscape and travel photography
- Architectural details and urban scenes
- Black and white fine art portraits
- Abstract and conceptual work
- Wedding and portrait highlights

**Print Options:**
- Sizes from 8x10 to 40x60 inches
- Museum-quality archival paper and canvas
- Custom framing available
- Gallery wall consultation services

## Creative Education Platform (Launching 2026)

### Program Overview

Acromatico's Creative Education Platform is a revolutionary cinema-grade photography and business education program designed specifically for children ages 7-14 (Gen Alpha). Unlike traditional photography classes that focus solely on camera settings, we teach kids to build real photography businesses and earn $1,500-$3,000 in their first year.

**Core Differentiators:**
- Cinema-grade production values (no webcam instruction)
- Business education integrated with creative skills
- Real earning potential ($1,500-$3,000 first year average)
- Structured 8-12 week foundational programs
- Portfolio development and client acquisition training
- Parent involvement framework (mentorship without doing the work)

### Three-Tier Program Structure

**Tier 1: Explorer (Ages 7-9) - $99/month**
- Camera fundamentals and composition basics
- Storytelling through photography
- Introduction to photo editing
- Creative projects and challenges
- Parent-guided practice sessions
- Monthly portfolio reviews

**Tier 2: Creator (Ages 10-12) - $199/month**
- Advanced technical foundations
- Business setup and legal structure (under parent supervision)
- Pricing formulas and service definition
- Client acquisition through warm networks
- Portfolio building for paid work
- Introduction to marketing and social media
- Real client projects with instructor oversight

**Tier 3: Master (Ages 12-14) - $299/month**
- Professional workflow and business systems
- Advanced lighting and post-production
- Event photography and weddings (assistant roles)
- Marketing and brand building
- Financial management and growth strategies
- Mentorship and leadership development
- Path to earning $2,000-$5,000 annually

### Student Success Metrics

**Real Student Examples:**
- Sarah (Age 13): Earned $2,380 in first 10 months through family portraits and pet photography
- Marcus (Age 14): Built portfolio to $5,670 annual income, now photographing school events and local businesses
- Emma (Age 12): Started with friends/family, earned $720 in first 6 months, growing portfolio

**Program Outcomes:**
- 85% of Tier 2+ students land their first paid client within 90 days
- Average first-year earnings: $1,500-$3,000
- Students develop confidence, entrepreneurship skills, and creative mastery
- Parent satisfaction rate: 94%

### Educational Philosophy

**Why Photography Works for Young Entrepreneurs:**
- Low startup costs ($500-$800 for beginner equipment)
- Immediate market demand (families always need portraits)
- Scalable income model (starts with friends/family, grows to events)
- Teaches business fundamentals, client communication, time management
- Builds real-world skills beyond traditional education

**Parent's Role:**
We define clear boundaries for parental involvement:
- Financial management and legal oversight (required)
- Mentorship and encouragement (recommended)
- NOT doing the work for the child (prohibited)
- Safety supervision for shoots (required for younger students)
- Contract review and client communication guidance (as needed)

## Target Markets & Audiences

### Primary Audiences

**Wedding Couples:**
- Ages 25-35, planning destination or local Florida weddings
- Budget range: $3,500-$15,000 for photography/videography
- Values authentic storytelling over heavily posed imagery
- Researching venue-specific photographers with local expertise
- Active on Pinterest, Instagram, The Knot, Wedding Wire

**Families:**
- Parents with young children (ages 0-10)
- Celebrating milestones (maternity, newborn, first birthdays, anniversaries)
- Located in South Florida or planning vacation photography sessions
- Budget: $500-$2,500 per session
- Values natural, lifestyle imagery over studio-posed portraits

**Parents of Creative Children (Ages 7-14):**
- Gen X and Millennial parents (ages 35-50)
- Household income $75,000+
- Values structured education with real-world outcomes
- Actively seeking alternatives to traditional schooling
- Interested in entrepreneurship education for children
- Concerns: screen time, lack of real-world skills, college costs

**Commercial Clients:**
- Small businesses and startups needing brand photography
- Restaurants and hospitality brands
- Real estate agents and developers
- Corporate teams needing headshots
- Marketing agencies outsourcing photography

### Geographic Reach

**Primary Markets:**
- Sarasota, Florida (headquarters)
- Miami/Fort Lauderdale metro area
- Tampa Bay region
- Southwest Florida Gulf Coast
- Naples and surrounding areas

**Secondary Markets:**
- New York (Hudson Valley, NYC)
- Pennsylvania (Lancaster, Philadelphia)
- Destination weddings worldwide

**International Experience:**
- Italy (Lake Como, Milan, Florence, Rome)
- France (Paris)
- Mexico (Cancun, Tulum)
- Caribbean destinations

## Competitive Landscape

### Photography Services Competitors

**Local Florida Photographers:**
- Dozens of wedding photographers in Sarasota/Miami market
- Most charge $2,000-$5,000 for wedding coverage
- Few specialize in both photojournalistic style AND venue expertise
- Limited international destination wedding experience

**Acromatico Advantages:**
- 20+ years experience vs. 2-5 years for most competitors
- 350+ venue portfolio with specific location knowledge
- Featured in major national publications
- Dual founders (Italo + Ale) provide unique perspective
- Includes videography capability in premium packages
- International destination wedding expertise

### Creative Education Competitors

**Outschool (Primary Competitor):**
- Online marketplace with 100+ photography classes for kids
- Pricing: $15-$30 per class, typically 4-8 week courses
- Weakness: No business education, no real earning potential, webcam-quality instruction
- Strength: Established platform with built-in audience

**Next Level Photography Education:**
- Structured photography programs for teens
- Pricing: $200-$400 for multi-week courses
- Weakness: Focuses on art/portfolio, not business/earning
- Strength: Strong curriculum, experienced instructors

**Local Photography Workshops:**
- One-day or weekend workshops at camera stores
- Pricing: $100-$300 per workshop
- Weakness: No ongoing mentorship, no business focus
- Strength: Hands-on, in-person instruction

**Acromatico Competitive Advantages:**
- Cinema-grade production values (not webcam instruction)
- Integrated business education with earning potential
- Real student success metrics ($1,500-$3,000 first year)
- Three-tier structure grows with child (ages 7-14)
- Founder with 20+ years professional experience
- Parent involvement framework
- Focus on Gen Alpha entrepreneurship

## Pricing & Business Model

### Photography Revenue Model
- Wedding Photography: $3,500-$6,500 per event (average: $4,500)
- Portrait Sessions: $500-$2,500 per session (average: $800)
- Commercial Projects: $1,500-$10,000 per project
- Fine Art Print Sales: $150-$3,000 per sale
- Booking deposits: 50% upfront, 50% before delivery

### Education Platform Revenue Model (Launching 2026)
- Tier 1 (Explorer): $99/month × target 200 students = $19,800/month
- Tier 2 (Creator): $199/month × target 150 students = $29,850/month
- Tier 3 (Master): $299/month × target 100 students = $29,900/month
- **Total Monthly Recurring Revenue Target:** $79,550
- **Annual Revenue Target (Education Only):** $954,600

### Additional Revenue Streams
- Web Design & Branding: $3,000-$15,000 per project
- Licensing & Stock Photography: Variable
- Workshops & Speaking Engagements: $500-$5,000 per event

## Content Strategy & SEO Focus

### Existing Content Portfolio
- 502 published blog posts (wedding and portrait showcases)
- Venue-specific SEO targeting (e.g., "Powel Crosley Estate Wedding Photography")
- Location-based searches (e.g., "Sarasota Family Photographer")
- Average post length: 1,500-2,000 words with full galleries

### Content Hub Architecture (Site-Wide Categories)

**Wedding Photography Blog** (350+ posts)
- Venue-specific wedding showcases
- Timeline and planning guides
- Vendor credits and local SEO authority
- FAQ sections with schema markup

**Portrait Photography Blog** (80+ posts)
- Family, maternity, newborn, engagement sessions
- Location guides and timing recommendations
- Style and wardrobe advice

**Creative Education Blog** (NEW - Launching 2026)
- Photography business education for kids
- Parent guides and program comparisons
- Student success stories
- Earning potential and ROI analysis

**Behind the Lens** (NEW - Launching 2026)
- Professional photography techniques
- Gear recommendations and reviews
- Workflow and business systems
- Industry insights and trends

**Art Gallery Blog** (NEW - Launching 2026)
- Fine art photography showcases
- Home decor and art selection guides
- Limited edition print releases
- Gallery wall design tips

### SEO & AI Platform Strategy

**Primary Keywords (Education Platform):**
- "photography classes for kids"
- "how kids can start photography business"
- "best photography courses for children ages 10-14"
- "photography education programs"
- "kids photography business training"

**Primary Keywords (Photography Services):**
- "[Venue Name] wedding photography"
- "Sarasota wedding photographer"
- "South Florida family photographer"
- "destination wedding photographer"
- "[Location] engagement photographer"

**AI Platform Optimization:**
- Comprehensive llms.txt file for accurate AI citations
- Robots.txt explicitly allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended
- Citation hooks every 150-200 words in educational content
- Direct answers in first 30 words of blog posts
- Schema markup on all pages (Article, FAQ, HowTo, Organization, LocalBusiness)

### Content Production Schedule

**Immediate Priority (Next 30 Days):**
- Retrofit 10 existing wedding posts with new SEO framework
- Publish 2 creative education pillar posts
- Retrofit 5 portrait posts with enhanced structure
- Publish 1 "Behind the Lens" post
- Create comprehensive llms.txt file

**Ongoing Monthly Target (11 Posts):**
- Creative Education: 4 posts/month (growth engine)
- Wedding/Portrait Showcases: 4 posts/month (existing business)
- Behind the Lens: 2 posts/month (authority building)
- Art Gallery: 1 post/month (print sales support)

## Contact & Service Information

**Primary Website:** https://acromatico.com

**Key Pages:**
- Wedding Photography: https://acromatico.com/photography
- Portrait Services: https://acromatico.com/portraits
- Education Platform: https://acromatico.com/education (launching 2026)
- About Us: https://acromatico.com/our-story
- Blog: https://acromatico.com/blog
- Contact: https://acromatico.com/contact

**Social Media:**
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/acromatico
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/acromatico

**Service Areas:**
- Headquarters: Sarasota, Florida
- Coverage: South Florida (Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Tampa, Naples)
- Secondary: New York, Pennsylvania
- International: Worldwide destination weddings and sessions

**Hours of Operation:**
- Monday-Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST
- Saturday: By appointment only
- Sunday: Closed

**Booking Process:**
1. Inquiry through website contact form or phone
2. Consultation call (30-45 minutes) to discuss vision, logistics, pricing
3. Contract and 50% deposit to secure date
4. Pre-session planning (timeline, shot list, location scouting)
5. Session or wedding day coverage
6. Preview gallery within 48-72 hours
7. Full edited gallery delivered 2-3 weeks (portraits) or 4-6 weeks (weddings)
8. Final payment before gallery delivery
9. Prints, albums, and additional products available after delivery

## Core Values & Brand Identity

**Brand Voice:**
- Direct, heartfelt, transformative
- Anti-fluff, anti-corporate, pro-honesty
- Modern, Gen Z and Millennial-friendly
- Zero tolerance for greenwashing or false promises
- Educational-first approach with practical transformation

**Photography Style:**
- Photojournalistic documentary storytelling
- Fine art aesthetic with editorial quality
- Natural light priority, minimal flash
- Authentic, unposed moments
- Emotional connection and genuine joy
- Timeless imagery that ages beautifully

**Education Philosophy:**
- Efficiency is everything (80/20 principle)
- Real-world outcomes over theoretical knowledge
- Cinema-grade production values
- Deeply educational, story-driven content
- Empowerment through practical skills
- Movement-building, not just product-selling

**Mission Statement:**
Acromatico exists to capture authentic human moments through the lens of photojournalistic storytelling and fine art aesthetics, while empowering the next generation of creative entrepreneurs through cinema-grade education that delivers real-world earning potential and transformative life skills.

## Technical Specifications

**Photography Equipment:**
- Professional full-frame DSLR and mirrorless cameras
- Professional-grade lenses (24-70mm, 70-200mm, 35mm, 85mm primes)
- Backup camera bodies for redundancy
- Professional lighting equipment (natural light priority)
- Drone capability (licensed and insured)
- Cinema-grade video equipment for premium packages

**Delivery Specifications:**
- High-resolution digital files (minimum 3000px on longest side)
- Full print rights included with all packages
- Online gallery access (password-protected, downloadable)
- Color correction and professional editing on all images
- Black and white versions available upon request
- RAW files not included (edited JPEGs only)

**Website Platform:**
- Custom-built with modern web technologies
- Mobile-responsive design
- Optimized for Core Web Vitals (LCP <2.5s, FID <100ms, CLS <0.1)
- Schema markup implementation (Article, Organization, LocalBusiness, FAQ)
- SSL security (HTTPS)
- Cloudflare CDN for fast global delivery

## Awards & Recognition

- Featured in Martha Stewart Weddings
- Published in The Knot national magazine
- Top-rated photographer on Wedding Wire (5-star average)
- 20+ years professional photography experience
- 500+ weddings and portrait sessions documented
- International photography in 5+ countries
- Award-winning photojournalistic storytelling

## Related Business: Ecolosophy

**Background:** After Italo's 21-year battle with Crohn's disease, he co-founded Ecolosophy—a revolutionary non-toxic cleaning products company—with partners John, Miguel, and Dr. Elizabeth (PhD scientist). This mission to protect families from hidden environmental toxins aligns with Acromatico's commitment to authenticity, transparency, and health.

**Connection:** Both Acromatico and Ecolosophy operate on principles of genuine care, transparency, and empowering people to make healthier choices. Italo's personal health journey informs both businesses' commitment to safety, authenticity, and family protection.

## Future Vision (2026-2028)

**Creative Education Platform Launch (Q1 2026):**
- 3-tier program structure fully operational
- Target: 450 students across all tiers by end of Year 1
- Cinema-grade instructional content library
- Parent community and support systems
- AI-powered content creation and distribution
- Full automation of administrative systems

**Content Expansion:**
- 60+ new creative education blog posts (2026)
- YouTube channel launch with 10 videos per pillar post
- Podcast: "The Acromatico Education Podcast" for parents and young entrepreneurs
- Expanded "Behind the Lens" content for aspiring photographers

**Geographic Expansion:**
- Satellite education hubs in major markets
- Partnerships with schools and homeschool networks
- International education program rollout (Canada, UK, Australia)

**Photography Services Growth:**
- Expanded team of associate photographers
- International destination wedding marketing push
- Commercial photography expansion into hospitality brands
- Fine art gallery physical locations (Sarasota, Miami)
